## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue this PR addresses (if applicable).

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] Refactoring (code cleanup, no behavior change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Experiment / Prototype

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number) or Links to #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- [ ] List your changes here
- [ ] Keep items focused and descriptive
- [ ] One item per bullet

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes:

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tested locally
- [ ] Manual testing (describe steps)
- [ ] N/A - documentation only

**Test Coverage:**
- Before: (describe what was tested before)
- After: (describe what is tested now)

## Checklist

Before requesting review, please verify:

- [ ] My branch was created from `dev` (not from `main`)
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have commented complex logic
- [ ] No breaking changes without discussion
- [ ] No credentials or secrets in code
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Tests pass locally: `pytest` or relevant test command
- [ ] No linting errors: `pylint` or relevant linter
- [ ] Commits have clear, descriptive messages
- [ ] PR description explains the "why" and not just the "what"

## Additional Notes

- **Performance Impact:** None / Minimal / Significant (describe)
- **Dependencies Changed:** Yes / No (list if yes)
- **Backward Compatibility:** Maintained / Breaking (explain if breaking)
- **Experiment Results** (if `exp/` branch): [Optional—include findings or link to notebook]

## Screenshots / Examples (if applicable)

If UI changes or output changes, provide examples:

```
Before:
[screenshot or code output]

After:
[screenshot or code output]
```

---

**Reviewers:** Please check for:
1. ✅ Logic correctness and edge cases
2. ✅ Code clarity and maintainability
3. ✅ Test coverage
4. ✅ No unintended side effects
5. ✅ Branch follows naming convention
